name: mkdocs-build

on:
  pull_request:
  push:
    branches: [main]

jobs:
  mkdocs-build:
    name: mkdocs-build
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: "3.11"

      - name: Install MkDocs
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install mkdocs mkdocs-material

      - name: Build (strict)
        run: mkdocs build -s
